name: Birthday
short: Birthday announcements with an optional birthday role.
description: Announce member birthdays in a configurable channel and optionally assign a birthday role for the day. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing Birthday!

Load it with `[p]load birthday`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores, per server, the birthday (day and month) that members opt in with, keyed by their Discord user ID, plus server configuration. A user can remove their own entry at any time.
